3.content:
# Digital Experience Monitoring Units (DEM)

* Read more about DEM Units [here](https://www.dynatrace.com/support/help/shortlink/monitoring-consumption#digital-experience-monitoring-)

## Real User Monitoring (RUM)

* User session per application (With Session Replay) = 1.0 DEM
* User session per application	(Without Session Replay playback) =	0.25 DEM

* Session & Action Properties = 0.01 DEM

## Synthetics

* Synthetic actions (Browser Monitors, Browser Clickpaths)	 = 1.0 DEM

* Synthetic request (HTTP monitor) = 0.1 DEM
* Third-party synthetic result	(Third-party synthetic API ingestion) = 0.1 DEM
